summary.key_theme: 公司近期因新產品發布與市場強勁動能，股價表現亮眼並創下 24 年新高，獲得市場分析師正面評價。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Hits 24-Year High on ‘Buy’ Reco
bullish.reason: 股價創下 24 年新高，反映出市場對其買入評級的強烈信心，是近期最強勁的利多訊號。

bullish.title: A Look At Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Valuation After Launch Of Observer Threat Forensics Product
bullish.reason: 推出 Observer Threat Forensics 新產品，有助於提升公司在資安檢測領域的競爭力與估值潛力。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on Viavi Solutions: “I Know It’s Expensive, But I’ll Tell You, That Is the Hot Area”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 指出該公司處於熱門產業領域，儘管估值偏高，但成長前景仍受市場關注。

bullish.title: Sunrun, Commercial Vehicle Group, Viavi Solutions, Goodyear, and ATI Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 報導指出 VIAV 股價持續上漲，顯示市場買盤動能強勁，為近期股價走勢提供支撐。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 針對股價上漲的分析，確認了公司在當前市場環境下的強勢表現。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions, Powell, Sterling, Energy Recovery, and Blink Charging Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 該報導與其他股價上漲新聞內容重複，作為市場動能持續的佐證，顯示 VIAV 近期表現優於大盤。

neutral.title: Stocks making big moves this week: Shopify, Winnebago, Coinbase, STAAR Surgical, and Viavi Solutions
neutral.reason: 僅列出該股為本週波動較大的標的之一，未提供具體的利多或利空分析，屬中性市場觀察。

neutral.title: Q4 Rundown: Viavi Solutions (NASDAQ:VIAV) Vs Other Inspection Instruments Stocks
neutral.reason: 對第四季財報進行同業比較，屬於常規的產業績效回顧，未對股價產生直接的推升或打壓影響。
